{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Perfected research station
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Perfected research station]] has a data core.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
